debug_info.goal:
α : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α
n : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (x : ZMod (n + 1)), x ∈ support $[0..n]

proof:
intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all
failed_attempts:
intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_cast x]
    exact fun i hi ↦ by simpa using support_uniformFin (n + 1) i hi

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_castOfNat, support_uniformFin]
    simp

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_castOfNat, support_uniformFin]
    simp

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_surjective n x]
    simp [support_uniformFin]

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_natCast]
    apply Fin.mem_univ

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_castOfNat, support_uniformFin]
    simp

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_natCast, Nat.cast_id]
    apply mem_support_uniformFin

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_cast x]
    apply support_uniformFin

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_castOfNat]
    exact mem_support_uniformFin _

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_cast]
    apply support_uniformFin

intro x
    rw [← ZMod.val_natCast]
    apply support_uniformFin
successful_attempts:
intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    rw [this]
    trivial

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp [this]

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp [this]

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp [this]

intro x
    have : support ($[0..n]) = Set.univ := support_uniformFin n
    simp_all
